sections.description: Automatically syncs SEO articles from the SEO platform into WordPress.
sections.changelog:
= 1.0.2 =
* Auth section Save now triggers a fresh login and page reload automatically.
* Status bar now displays the account name from the API instead of the email address.
* Tag assignment disabled — articles no longer auto-register WordPress tags on sync.
* Japanese (ja) translation corrected and recompiled.
* Built-in update checker added — future updates appear natively in the Plugins screen.

= 1.0.1 =
* Test release.
